dynamic.pricing.annualSavingsSentence: Professional, Team, and Network save 17% on annual billing.
dynamic.pricing.buyerFree: For pilots and small teams testing AGRO-AI.
dynamic.pricing.buyerProfessional: For commercial farms, advisors, and operators running field operations.
dynamic.pricing.buyerTeam: For advisory teams, farm management teams, and multi-site operators.
dynamic.pricing.buyerNetwork: For grower networks, water districts, exporters, lenders, insurers, and multi-farm programs.
dynamic.pricing.buyerEnterprise: For agencies, lenders, insurers, food companies, and national-scale networks.
dynamic.pricing.fManualImports: Manual and chat file imports within quota
dynamic.pricing.copyProfessional: Professional unlocks reports, Weather, OpenET, live connectors, 500 AGRO-AI actions, and 25 Deep analyses each month.
dynamic.pricing.copyTeam: Team unlocks direct invitations, role controls, shared evidence, approvals, 2,500 AGRO-AI actions, and 150 Deep analyses each month.
dynamic.pricing.copyNetwork: Network unlocks standard Custom API access, multi-workspace rollups, 10,000 AGRO-AI actions, and 750 Deep analyses each month.
dynamic.pricing.copyEnterprise: Enterprise adds bespoke integrations, custom security, SSO, governance review, and contract-configured AI capacity.
dynamic.pricing.freeAvailable: Free workspace is already available on your account.
dynamic.pricing.enterpriseRequest: Enterprise request received. Sales follow-up was created.
dynamic.pricing.createAccountTemplate: Create an account first, then Stripe checkout will open for {plan}.
dynamic.pricing.upgradeReceived: Upgrade request received. Stripe checkout was not returned by the backend.
dynamic.pricing.checkoutFailed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
dynamic.operations.subtitle: Turn workspace evidence into operator action, water risk review, compliance preparation, and manager-ready field priorities.
dynamic.operations.needsEvidenceDetail: Upload recent controller exports, field notes, ET, flow, or soil records so the next decision can move from setup guidance into operations.
dynamic.operations.chooseCard: Choose a decision card to run the current workspace.
dynamic.operations.chooseCardDetail: AGRO-AI will return the action, why it matters, the risk level, evidence used, and what still needs confirmation.
dynamic.operations.pdfRetry: Report preview ready. PDF export needs retry.
dynamic.evidence.title: Evidence
dynamic.evidence.subtitle: Upload controller exports, CSVs, PDFs, spreadsheets, weather data, ET files, field logs, and messy customer documents. AGRO-AI turns usable rows into citation-ready evidence.
dynamic.evidence.dropFiles: Drop fragmented customer files here first.
dynamic.evidence.uploadDetail: This creates a manual evidence connector automatically, stores the source, parses rows, suggests mappings, and makes the records available to Decisions, Reports, Assurance, and Ask AGRO-AI.
dynamic.evidence.emptyDetail: Upload a customer file above or open Connectors to create a WiseConn/Talgil/manual upload setup.
dynamic.evidence.uploadTemplate: Uploaded {files} file(s). Created {evidence} evidence records from {rows} parsed rows.
dynamic.overview.subtitle: Field queue, tasks, evidence gaps, reports, and audit follow-through in one operating room.
dynamic.overview.noQueueDetail: Add a field update or connect evidence to populate today’s queue.
dynamic.overview.noTasksDetail: Field exceptions and missing evidence will create tasks here.
dynamic.overview.tellField: Tell AGRO-AI what happened in the field…
dynamic.overview.noBlocking: No blocking evidence gaps are listed right now.
dynamic.overview.noAuditDetail: Uploads, field updates, tasks, decisions, and reports will appear here.
dynamic.cockpit.readinessDetail: Daily source coverage, connector health, evidence volume, and missing operating context.
dynamic.cockpit.sampleDetail: This workspace has no operational evidence yet. Connect or upload data before sending reports or approving field actions.
dynamic.cockpit.fieldsDetail: Field/block risk, evidence coverage, confidence, and next operator action.
dynamic.cockpit.noFieldDetail: The field view is showing a safe sample placeholder until data is uploaded or connected.
dynamic.cockpit.exceptionsDetail: Ranked connector, data quality, field risk, compliance, and reporting issues.
dynamic.cockpit.workbenchDetail: Evidence-backed recommendations, missing evidence, impact, and operator instructions.
dynamic.cockpit.reportFactoryDetail: Structured report preview from readiness, field intelligence, exceptions, decisions, and evidence appendix.
dynamic.integrations.title: Connectors
dynamic.integrations.subtitle: Authorize, choose scope, sync, done. Provider complexity stays behind AGRO-AI.
dynamic.integrations.quotaDetail: File imports share one monthly quota: 15 on Free, 500 on Professional, 2,500 on Team, 10,000 on Network. Weather and OpenET start on Professional; standard Custom API starts on Network; bespoke integrations require Enterprise.
dynamic.integrations.search: Search John Deere, WiseConn, Talgil, OpenET, Google, Microsoft...
dynamic.integrations.attachDetail: CSV, JSON, TXT, or PDF. AGRO-AI will parse and cite usable records.
dynamic.integrations.chooseFile: Choose a file below to import evidence.
dynamic.integrations.syncAlready: A sync is already queued or running.
dynamic.integrations.syncQueued: Sync queued. AGRO-AI will ingest the authorized Operations Center context through the durable worker path.
dynamic.integrations.disconnected: Operations Center disconnected and locally stored connector credentials revoked.
dynamic.integrations.upgradeMessageTempl: Unlock {provider}: {description} Without {provider} connected, this source stays outside AGRO-AI and your team relies more on manual imports, stale snapshots, and disconnected handoffs. Upgrade to {plan} to connect {provider} and bring {subtitle} into the operating workflow.
dynamic.paywall.reportsGenerate: Professional turns live evidence into reusable decision briefs, compliance drafts, operating reports, and PDF-ready output. Stay on Free and your team keeps rebuilding summaries by hand, formatting documents outside AGRO-AI, and losing time between evidence and action.
dynamic.paywall.reportsExport: Professional turns your AGRO-AI work into polished, exportable PDFs your team can deliver to growers, partners, auditors, and decision-makers. Stay on Free and the final packaging, delivery, and repeatable reporting work remains manual.
dynamic.paywall.team: Team turns individual AGRO-AI work into coordinated operations with direct invitations, role controls, shared evidence, and approvals. Stay below Team and collaboration keeps spilling into inboxes, side chats, duplicate files, and manual follow-up—exactly where decisions get delayed or lost.
dynamic.paywall.requests: Team gives operators one tracked request inbox for support, onboarding, integrations, upgrades, ownership, and follow-through. Stay below Team and important requests remain scattered across email and ad hoc follow-ups, making delays, duplicate work, and missed handoffs much more likely.
